textAr: وَٱلذَّٰرِيَـٰتِ ذَرْوًا
textEn: By the winds that scatter [dust],
textTranslit: Waz-zaariyaati zarwaa

textAr: فَٱلْحَـٰمِلَـٰتِ وِقْرًا
textEn: and by the clouds carrying loads of water,
textTranslit: Falhaamilaati wiqraa

textAr: فَٱلْجَـٰرِيَـٰتِ يُسْرًا
textEn: and by the ships that sail with ease,
textTranslit: Faljaariyaati yusraa

textAr: فَٱلْمُقَسِّمَـٰتِ أَمْرًا
textEn: and by the angels who distribute [blessings] by His command.
textTranslit: Falmuqassimaati amraa

textAr: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَصَادِقٌ
textEn: Indeed, what you are promised is true,
textTranslit: Innamaa too'adoona la-saadiq

textAr: وَإِنَّ ٱلدِّينَ لَوَٰقِعٌ
textEn: and the Judgment will surely come to pass.
textTranslit: Wa innad deena la waaqi'

textAr: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلْحُبُكِ
textEn: By the heaven with its pathways,
textTranslit: Wassamaaa'i zaatil hubuk

textAr: إِنَّكُمْ لَفِى قَوْلٍ مُّخْتَلِفٍ
textEn: Indeed, you [Makkans] have conflicting views.
textTranslit: Innakum lafee qawlim mukhtalif

textAr: يُؤْفَكُ عَنْهُ مَنْ أُفِكَ
textEn: He who is diverted from it is destined to be diverted.
textTranslit: Yu'faku 'anhu man ufik

textAr: قُتِلَ ٱلْخَرَّٰصُونَ
textEn: Doomed are those who base their beliefs on conjecture.
textTranslit: Qutilal kharraasoon

textAr: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى غَمْرَةٍ سَاهُونَ
textEn: those who are steeped in ignorance heedlessly.
textTranslit: Allazeena hum fee ghamratin saahoon

textAr: يَسْـَٔلُونَ أَيَّانَ يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
textEn: They ask [mockingly], “When is the Day of Judgment?”
textTranslit: Yas'aloona ayyaana yawmud Deen

textAr: يَوْمَ هُمْ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ يُفْتَنُونَ
textEn: It is the Day when they will be punished by the Fire.
textTranslit: Yawma hum 'alan naari yuftanoon

textAr: ذُوقُوا۟ فِتْنَتَكُمْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
textEn: [It will be said], “Taste your punishment! This is what you were seeking to hasten.”
textTranslit: Zooqoo fitnatakum haa zal lazee kuntum bihee tas ta'jiloon

textAr: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
textEn: Indeed, the righteous will be in gardens and springs,
textTranslit: Innal muttaqeena fee jannaatinw wa 'uyoon

textAr: ءَاخِذِينَ مَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُحْسِنِينَ
textEn: receiving what their Lord will give them, for they were indeed doers of good beforehand.
textTranslit: Aakhizeena maaa aataahum Rabbuhum; innahum kaanoo qabla zaalika muhsineen

textAr: كَانُوا۟ قَلِيلًا مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ مَا يَهْجَعُونَ
textEn: They used to sleep only a little at night,
textTranslit: kaanoo qaleelam minal laili maa yahja'oon

textAr: وَبِٱلْأَسْحَارِ هُمْ يَسْتَغْفِرُونَ
textEn: and before dawn they would seek forgiveness,
textTranslit: Wa bilashaari hum yastaghfiroon

textAr: وَفِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِهِمْ حَقٌّ لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلْمَحْرُومِ
textEn: and in their wealth, there was a share for the beggar and the destitute.
textTranslit: Wa feee amwaalihim haqqul lissaaa'ili walmahroom

textAr: وَفِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ءَايَـٰتٌ لِّلْمُوقِنِينَ
textEn: On earth there are signs for those who are certain in faith,
textTranslit: Wa fil ardi aayaatul lilmooqineen

textAr: وَفِىٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ ۚ أَفَلَا تُبْصِرُونَ
textEn: and also within yourselves. Do you not see?
textTranslit: Wa feee anfusikum; afalaa tubsiroon

textAr: وَفِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ رِزْقُكُمْ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ
textEn: And in the heaven is your provision and all that you are promised.
textTranslit: Wa fissamaaa'i rizqukum wa maa too'adoon

textAr: فَوَرَبِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِنَّهُۥ لَحَقٌّ مِّثْلَ مَآ أَنَّكُمْ تَنطِقُونَ
textEn: By the Lord of the heaven and earth, this [resurrection] is certainly as true as the fact that you can speak.
textTranslit: Fawa Rabbis samaaa'i wal ardi innahoo lahaqqum misla maa annakum tantiqoon

textAr: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ضَيْفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ
textEn: Has there come to you the story of Abraham’s honored guests?
textTranslit: Hal ataaka hadeesu daifi Ibraaheemal mukrameen

textAr: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا۟ سَلَـٰمًا ۖ قَالَ سَلَـٰمٌ قَوْمٌ مُّنكَرُونَ
textEn: When they came to him and said, “Peace.” He said, “Upon you be peace.” [saying to himself] “Unknown people!”
textTranslit: Iz dakhaloo 'alaihi faqaaloo salaaman qaala salaamun qawmum munkaroon

textAr: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ فَجَآءَ بِعِجْلٍ سَمِينٍ
textEn: Then he went quickly to his household, and came with a fat [roasted] calf,
textTranslit: Faraagha ilaaa ahlihee fajaaa'a bi'ijlin sameen

textAr: فَقَرَّبَهُۥٓ إِلَيْهِمْ قَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ
textEn: and placed it before them and said, “Will you not eat?”
textTranslit: Faqarrabahooo ilaihim qaala alaa taakuloon

textAr: فَأَوْجَسَ مِنْهُمْ خِيفَةً ۖ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ ۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَـٰمٍ عَلِيمٍ
textEn: He felt apprehensive about them. They said, “Do not be afraid,” and gave him glad tidings of a knowledgeable son.
textTranslit: Fa awjasa minhm khee fatan qaaloo laa takhaf wa bashsharoohu bighulaamin 'aleem

textAr: فَأَقْبَلَتِ ٱمْرَأَتُهُۥ فِى صَرَّةٍ فَصَكَّتْ وَجْهَهَا وَقَالَتْ عَجُوزٌ عَقِيمٌ
textEn: His wife cried out loud, and struck her face [in astonishment] and said, “[I am] a barren old woman!”
textTranslit: Fa aqbalatim ra-atuhoo fee sarratin fasakkat wajhahaa wa qaalat 'ajoozun 'aqeem

textAr: قَالُوا۟ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
textEn: They said, “This is what your Lord said. Indeed, He is the All-Wise, the All-Knowing.”
textTranslit: Qaaloo kazaaliki qaala Rabbuki innahoo huwal hakeemul 'aleem

textAr: ۞ قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
textEn: Abraham said, “Then what is your mission, O messengers?”
textTranslit: Qaala famaa khatbukum ayyuhal mursaloon

textAr: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍ مُّجْرِمِينَ
textEn: They said, “We have been sent to a wicked people,
textTranslit: Qaalooo innaaa ursilnaaa ilaa qawmim mujrimeen

textAr: لِنُرْسِلَ عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن طِينٍ
textEn: to send down upon them stones of clay,
textTranslit: Linursila 'alaihim hijaa ratam min teen

textAr: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُسْرِفِينَ
textEn: marked by your Lord for the transgressors.”
textTranslit: Musawwamatan 'inda rabbika lilmusrifeen

textAr: فَأَخْرَجْنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
textEn: We brought out those believers who were there,
textTranslit: Fa akhrajnaa man kaana feehaa minal mu'mineen

textAr: فَمَا وَجَدْنَا فِيهَا غَيْرَ بَيْتٍ مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
textEn: but We only found in it one Muslim household.
textTranslit: Famaa wajadnaa feehaa ghaira baitim minal muslimeen

textAr: وَتَرَكْنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَةً لِّلَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ
textEn: And We left there a sign for those who fear the painful punishment.
textTranslit: Wa taraknaa feehaaa aayatal lillazeena yakhaafoonal 'azaabal aleem

textAr: وَفِى مُوسَىٰٓ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَـٰهُ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
textEn: And [there is a sign in the story of] Moses when We sent him to Pharaoh with compelling proofs,
textTranslit: Wa fee Moosaaa iz arsalnaahu ilaa Fir'wna bisultaa nim mubeen

textAr: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكْنِهِۦ وَقَالَ سَـٰحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
textEn: But he and his supporters turned away, and he said about [Moses], “A magician or a madman!”
textTranslit: Fatawalla biruknihee wa qaala saahirun aw majnoon

textAr: فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُ وَجُنُودَهُۥ فَنَبَذْنَـٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٌ
textEn: So We seized him and his soldiers and cast them into the sea while he was blameworthy.
textTranslit: Fa akhaznaahu wa junoo dahoo fanabaznaahum fil yammi wa huwa muleem

textAr: وَفِى عَادٍ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلرِّيحَ ٱلْعَقِيمَ
textEn: And [there is a sign in the story of] ‘Ād, when We sent against them the devastating barren wind.
textTranslit: Wa fee 'Aadin iz arsalnaa 'alaihimur reehal'aqeem

textAr: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَىْءٍ أَتَتْ عَلَيْهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتْهُ كَٱلرَّمِيمِ
textEn: It spared nothing it came upon except that it reduced it to ruin and decay.
textTranslit: Maa tazaru min shai'in atat 'alaihi illaa ja'alat hu karrameem

textAr: وَفِى ثَمُودَ إِذْ قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَمَتَّعُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
textEn: And [there is a sign in the story of] Thamūd, when they were told, “Enjoy yourselves for a while.”
textTranslit: Wa fee Samooda iz qeela lahum tamatta''oo hattaa heen

textAr: فَعَتَوْا۟ عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّـٰعِقَةُ وَهُمْ يَنظُرُونَ
textEn: But they rebelled against the command of their Lord, so the thunderbolt seized them, while they were looking on.
textTranslit: Fa'ataw 'an amri Rabbihim fa akhazal humus saa'iqatu wa hum yanzuroon

textAr: فَمَا ٱسْتَطَـٰعُوا۟ مِن قِيَامٍ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنتَصِرِينَ
textEn: They could not withstand it, nor could they ward it off.
textTranslit: Famas tataa'oo min qiyaaminw wa maa kaanoo muntasireen

textAr: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا فَـٰسِقِينَ
textEn: And the people of Noah [were also destroyed] before them. They were indeed a rebellious people.
textTranslit: Wa qawma Noohim min qablu innahum kaano qawman faasiqeen

textAr: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بَنَيْنَـٰهَا بِأَيْي۟دٍ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ
textEn: We built the heaven with might, and We are indeed expanding it.
textTranslit: Wassamaaa'a banainaa haa bi aydinw wa innaa lamoosi'oon

textAr: وَٱلْأَرْضَ فَرَشْنَـٰهَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْمَـٰهِدُونَ
textEn: And We spread out the earth. How well did We smooth it out!
textTranslit: Wal arda farashnaahaa fani'mal maahidoon

textAr: وَمِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ
textEn: And We have created everything in pairs, so that you may take heed.
textTranslit: Wa min kulli shai'in khalaqnaa zawjaini la'allakum tazakkaroon

textAr: فَفِرُّوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
textEn: So flee to Allah. Indeed, I am a clear warner to you from Him.
textTranslit: Fafirrooo ilal laahi innee lakum minhu nazeerum mubeen

textAr: وَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
textEn: And do not set up another god with Allah. Indeed, I am a clear warner to you from Him.”
textTranslit: Wa laa taj'aloo ma'al laahi ilaahan aakhara innee lakum minhu nazeerum mubeen

textAr: كَذَٰلِكَ مَآ أَتَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا قَالُوا۟ سَاحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
textEn: Likewise, no messenger came to those before them without being told: “A magician, or a madman!”
textTranslit: Kazaalika maaa atal lazeena min qablihim mir Rasoolin illaa qaaloo saahirun aw majnoon

textAr: أَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِهِۦ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
textEn: Did they suggest this to one another? Rather they are transgressing people.
textTranslit: Atawaasaw bih; bal hum qawmun taaghoon

textAr: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِمَلُومٍ
textEn: So turn away from them [O Prophet], for you are not to blame.
textTranslit: Fatawalla 'anhum famaaa anta bimaloom

textAr: وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ تَنفَعُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
textEn: But keep reminding them, for reminder benefits the believers.
textTranslit: Wa zakkir fa innaz zikraa tanfa'ul mu'mineen

textAr: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ ٱلْجِنَّ وَٱلْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
textEn: I have not created the jinn and mankind except to worship Me.
textTranslit: Wa maa khalaqtul jinna wal insa illaa liya'budoon

textAr: مَآ أُرِيدُ مِنْهُم مِّن رِّزْقٍ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَن يُطْعِمُونِ
textEn: I seek no provision from them, nor do I want them to feed Me.
textTranslit: Maaa ureedu minhum mir rizqinw wa maaa ureedu anyyut'imoon

textAr: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلرَّزَّاقُ ذُو ٱلْقُوَّةِ ٱلْمَتِينُ
textEn: Indeed, it is Allah Who is the All-Provider, Lord of Power, the Mighty.
textTranslit: Innal laaha Huwar Razzaaqu Zul Quwwatil Mateen

textAr: فَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ ذَنُوبًا مِّثْلَ ذَنُوبِ أَصْحَـٰبِهِمْ فَلَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونِ
textEn: Indeed, those who do wrong will have a share [of punishment] like that of their predecessors, so let them not ask Me to hasten it.
textTranslit: Fa inna lillazeena zalamoo zanoobam misla zanoobi ashaabihim falaa yasta'jiloon

textAr: فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن يَوْمِهِمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
textEn: So woe to those who disbelieve from [the punishment of] the Day which they are promised.
textTranslit: Fawailul lillazeena kafaroo miny yawmihimul lazee yoo'adoon
